code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const MessageInput=_ref=>{let{onSendMessage}=_ref;const[text,setText]=useState('');const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(text.trim()){onSendMessage(text);setText('');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:text,onChange:e=>setText(e.target.value),placeholder:"Chat with the AI assistant...",className:"w-full p-2 border rounded-lg"})});};export default MessageInput;
